sqlMap.select: select * from FirmInitLawsuitsLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and FeeSuitDispositionKey = #FeeSuitDispositionKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into FirmInitLawsuitsLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey AmountOfFeesSued DueDateFees SuitFilesDateFees LastUpdateUserID IsFavOutInUnderMatter LastUpdateTimeStamp IsAllegOfLegalMalPrac FeesAreaOfPractice FeeSuitDispositionKey ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #AmountOfFeesSued# #DueDateFees# #SuitFilesDateFees# #LastUpdateUserID# #IsFavOutInUnderMatter# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #IsAllegOfLegalMalPrac# #FeesAreaOfPractice# #FeeSuitDispositionKey# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('FirmInitLawsuitsLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select FirminitLawsuitsKey, AmountOfFeesSued, DueDateFees, SuitFilesDateFees, LastUpdateUserID, IsFavOutInUnderMatter, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsAllegOfLegalMalPrac, FeesAreaOfPractice, FeeSuitDispositionKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FirmInitLawsuitsLW where FirminitLawsuitsKey = #FirminitLawsuitsKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update FirmInitLawsuitsLW set
AmountOfFeesSued = #AmountOfFeesSued# AmountOfFeesSued = null DueDateFees = #DueDateFees# DueDateFees = null SuitFilesDateFees = #SuitFilesDateFees# SuitFilesDateFees = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null IsFavOutInUnderMatter = #IsFavOutInUnderMatter# IsFavOutInUnderMatter = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null IsAllegOfLegalMalPrac = #IsAllegOfLegalMalPrac# IsAllegOfLegalMalPrac = null FeesAreaOfPractice = #FeesAreaOfPractice# FeesAreaOfPractice = null FeeSuitDispositionKey = #FeeSuitDispositionKey# FeeSuitDispositionKey = null
where FirminitLawsuitsKey = #FirminitLawsuitsKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from FirmInitLawsuitsLW where FirminitLawsuitsKey = #FirminitLawsuitsKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from FirmInitLawsuitsLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and FeeSuitDispositionKey = #FeeSuitDispositionKey#
sqlMap.select: select FirminitLawsuitsKey, AmountOfFeesSued, DueDateFees, SuitFilesDateFees, LastUpdateUserID, IsFavOutInUnderMatter, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsAllegOfLegalMalPrac, FeesAreaOfPractice, FeeSuitDispositionKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FirmInitLawsuitsLW where FirminitLawsuitsKey = #FirminitLawsuitsKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select FirminitLawsuitsKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AmountOfFeesSued, DueDateFees, SuitFilesDateFees, LastUpdateUserID, IsFavOutInUnderMatter, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsAllegOfLegalMalPrac, FeesAreaOfPractice, FeeSuitDispositionKey from FirmInitLawsuitsLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and FeeSuitDispositionKey = #FeeSuitDispositionKey#
